summary: Frontend-only verification completed for SMTP settings UX and admin settings regression. Requested flows passed without triggering new booking/approval/rejection emails.
critical_code_review_comments: Stale product copy remains in backend default_landing_content() (server.py) describing email notifications as internally logged; this can conflict with current SMTP-active behavior messaging.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated admin SMTP settings UI on production preview URL. Confirmed SMTP mode pill, masked password input, no prefilled plaintext password, and settings save action works with success toast.
rca of the issue: No functional UI defect reproduced in requested scope. Only code-review finding is stale default landing copy referencing internal email logging.
